tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary only demonstrates 'eq' predicate in examples; this tests 'ult' predicate which is covered by the general predicate preservation logic but not explicitly mentioned

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i1 @inttoptr_different_predicate_ult(i64 %x, i64 %y) {
#0:
  %xptr = inttoptr i64 %x to ptr
  %yptr = inttoptr i64 %y to ptr
  %cmp = icmp ult ptr %xptr, %yptr
  ret i1 %cmp
}
=>
define i1 @inttoptr_different_predicate_ult(i64 %x, i64 %y) {
#0:
  %cmp = icmp ult i64 %x, %y
  ret i1 %cmp
}

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary mentions constant pointers but examples only show inttoptr constants, not global variable addresses converted through ptrtoint then inttoptr

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
@global_var = global 4 bytes, align 4

define i1 @inttoptr_global_address(i64 %x) {
#0:
  %xptr = inttoptr i64 %x to ptr
  %gptr = ptrtoint ptr @global_var to i64
  %gptr_cast = inttoptr i64 %gptr to ptr
  %cmp = icmp eq ptr %xptr, %gptr_cast
  ret i1 %cmp
}
=>
@global_var = global 4 bytes, align 4

define i1 @inttoptr_global_address(i64 %x) {
#0:
  %__constexpr_0 = ptrtoint ptr @global_var to i64
  %cmp = icmp eq i64 %x, %__constexpr_0
  ret i1 %cmp
}
Transformation seems to be correct!
